name: claude-code-sandbox
postCreateCommand: sudo chown vscode:vscode /home/vscode/.claude && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y iptables ipset iproute2 dnsutils jq curl aggregate && sudo install -m 0755 .devcontainer/init-firewall.sh /usr/local/bin/init-firewall.sh && sudo sh -c 'echo "vscode ALL=(root) NOPASSWD: /usr/local/bin/init-firewall.sh" > /etc/sudoers.d/vscode && chmod 0440 /etc/sudoers.d/vscode'
